name: glucose-revolution
description: Jessie Inchauspé's 'Glucose Revolution: The Life-Changing Power of Balancing Your Blood Sugar' — based on the Glucose Goddess movement. A practical guide to understanding glucose spikes and using 10 simple food hacks (eating order, vinegar, veggie starters, savory breakfasts, post-meal movement) to flatten your glucose curve and transform your health.
useCase: Understanding glucose spikes and their effects on health, learning to flatten glucose curves through food order and preparation hacks, managing cravings and energy, and reducing risk of metabolic disease.
knownRisks: Author is a scientist, not a doctor — not medical advice
Individual glucose responses vary; not all hacks work equally for everyone
Continuous glucose monitors (CGMs) are not necessary to implement the hacks
Not a complete nutrition plan — focuses specifically on glucose management
